title: Utilitycraft (QOL Modpack)
description: Tired of having to install mods manually to be able to play the game normally? Tired of optimization modpacks not including various qol and much needed client sided mods to enhance your game? This kind of issue is what we solve with Too Many Optimized!
body:
# UtilityCraft (QOL Modpack)

Tired of having to install mods manually to be able to play the game normally? Tired of optimization modpacks not including various qol and much needed client sided mods? Fear no more because Too Many Items has arrived and is here to solve all your previous issues! We offer every top optimization mod for the respective Minecraft Version and provide much needed Quality-Of-Life mods in the same modpack!


# What's Included?

There are many mods included in this bundle! I will name the main mods below and their functionality! 

## MOD LIST
1. Sodium
2. Lithium
3. Concurrent
4. Chunk Managment Engine
5. Dynamic FPS
6. Immediately Fast
7. Iris
8. Ksyxis
9. More Culling 
10. Better "Add Server"
11. EffectTimerPlus
12. Essentials
13. Fast IP Ping
14. Gamma Utils
15. Mod Menu
16. More Chat History
17. Peek
18. Sodium Extra
19. Reese's Sodium Options
20. Sprint After Death
21. Tooltip Scroll
22. Visuality
23. ViaFabricPlus
24. Litematica

## DEPENDENCIES

1. Fabric API
2. Text Placeholder API
3. YetAnotherConfig Lib
4. Cloth Config API
5. MaLiLib

(Since 1.21.4 just recently released, a lot of good mods have not been updated yet. Crucial mods like Nvidium will be included when they are available for 1.21.4)
